parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const reportDate = d.report_date ? d.report_date.toString().substring(0, 10) : 'N/A';
const sleepQualityMap = { 1: 'Excellent', 2: 'Good', 3: 'Fair', 4: 'Poor', 5: 'Very Poor' };
const sleepQualityLabel = d.sleep_quality ? (sleepQualityMap[d.sleep_quality] ?? d.sleep_quality) : 'N/A';

const todayObj = new Date();
const today = todayObj.toISOString().split('T')[0];
const dayNames = ['Sunday','Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday'];
const todayName = dayNames[todayObj.getDay()];

const weekNumber = Math.floor((todayObj - new Date(todayObj.getFullYear(), 0, 1)) / (7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
const isWeekA = weekNumber % 2 === 0;

const workoutSplit = {
  Monday:    { label: 'PUSH A — Chest Dominant',            type: 'Push', intensity: 'High',       variations: `1. Flat DB Press 3×[12,10,8] + Tricep Lying One-Arm Extension 3×[12,10,8]
2. Barbell OHP 3×[12,10,8] + Lateral Raises 3×[12,10,8]
3. Incline Barbell Press 3×[12,10,8] + Tricep Cable Extension 3×[12,10,8] + Shoulder Machine Front Press 3×[12,10,8]
DROP SET FINISHER: Pec Deck Fly → Tricep Overhead Rope Extension → Cable Face Pull` },
  Tuesday:   { label: 'PULL A — Back Dominant',             type: 'Pull', intensity: 'High',       variations: `1. Barbell Row 3×[12,10,8] + Barbell Curl 3×[12,10,8]
2. Lat Pulldown wide grip 3×[12,10,8] + Hammer Curl 3×[12,10,8]
3. Seated Cable Row 3×[12,10,8] + Incline DB Curl 3×[12,10,8] + Machine Row 3×[12,10,8]
DROP SET FINISHER: Straight Arm Pulldown → Cable Rope Curl → Shrugs` },
  Wednesday: { label: 'LEGS A — Quad Dominant',             type: 'Legs', intensity: 'High',       variations: `1. Barbell Squat 3×[12,10,8] + Leg Extension 3×[12,10,8]
2. Hack Squat 3×[12,10,8] + Walking Lunges 3×[12,10,8]
3. Leg Press 3×[12,10,8] + Sissy Squat 3×[12,10,8] + Calf Raises 3×[12,10,8]
DROP SET FINISHER: Leg Curl → Hip Adductor Machine → Seated Calf Raise` },
  Thursday:  { label: 'PUSH B — Shoulder Dominant',         type: 'Push', intensity: 'High',       variations: `1. Seated DB OHP 3×[12,10,8] + Tricep Overhead Cable Extension 3×[12,10,8]
2. Cable Lateral Raises 3×[12,10,8] + Arnold Press 3×[12,10,8]
3. Decline DB Press 3×[12,10,8] + Tricep Dips 3×[12,10,8] + Rear Delt Fly Machine 3×[12,10,8]
DROP SET FINISHER: Incline DB Fly → Tricep Cable Pushdown reverse grip → DB Front Raise` },
  Friday:    { label: 'PULL B — Bicep + Rear Delt Dominant', type: 'Pull', intensity: 'High',       variations: `1. Deadlift 3×[12,10,8] + Concentration Curl 3×[12,10,8]
2. T-Bar Row 3×[12,10,8] + Spider Curl 3×[12,10,8]
3. Single Arm DB Row 3×[12,10,8] + Cable Rope Curl 3×[12,10,8] + Reverse Fly DB 3×[12,10,8]
DROP SET FINISHER: Close Grip Lat Pulldown → Preacher Curl → Cable Upright Row` },
  Saturday:  { label: 'LEGS B — Hamstring + Glute Dominant', type: 'Legs', intensity: 'Very High',  variations: `1. Romanian Deadlift 3×[12,10,8] + Leg Curl 3×[12,10,8]
2. Bulgarian Split Squat 3×[12,10,8] + Glute Kickback Machine 3×[12,10,8]
3. Sumo Squat DB 3×[12,10,8] + Nordic Curl 3×[12,10,8] + Seated Calf Raise 3×[12,10,8]
DROP SET FINISHER: Leg Extension → Hip Abductor Machine → Standing Calf Raise` },
  Sunday:    { label: 'Morning Run — Active Recovery',      type: 'Cardio', intensity: 'Low-Moderate', variations: `Easy 20-30 min run at conversational pace. Focus on form and breathing.
10 min post-run: dynamic stretching.` }
};

const todayWorkout = workoutSplit[todayName] || { label: 'Rest', type: 'Rest', intensity: 'Low', variations: 'Full rest day.' };

const hrvFlag = !d.hrv_avg ? 'Unknown' : d.hrv_avg < 35 ? 'FATIGUED — reduce volume 20%, no max intensity' : d.hrv_avg < 50 ? 'MODERATE — train but pace yourself' : 'RECOVERED — go all out';
const sleepFlag = !d.sleep_score ? 'Unknown' : d.sleep_score < 60 ? 'POOR — flag recovery, light cardio only' : d.sleep_score < 75 ? 'AVERAGE — normal training ok' : 'GOOD — fully ready';

const creatorsLibrary = `KUNAL'S APPROVED CREATORS — use ONLY these. Match to today's session type.

🏋️ SCIENCE & TECHNIQUE:
- Jeff Nippard → Science-based hypertrophy, progressive overload
- Hany Rambod → FST-7 hypertrophy coaching, pro bodybuilding
- Athlean-X / Jeff Cavaliere → Injury prevention, biomechanics
- Dr. Mike Israetel → Volume, progressive overload, MEV/MRV science
- Alan Thrall → Squat/deadlift/bench form cues

💪 LIFESTYLE & MOTIVATION:
- Chris Bumstead → Classic physique, gym lifestyle, morning routines
- Jesse James West → High energy gym challenges
- CT Fletcher → Raw intensity, iron discipline
- David Laid → Long-game discipline, aesthetic training
- Simeon Panda → Natural bodybuilder, full workout routines

🧠 MINDSET & DISCIPLINE:
- Shivi Kaushik → Mindset, discipline, Indian creator
- Saket Gokhale → Indian fitness coach, nutrition
- Yatinder Singh → Indian bodybuilder, Hindi motivation
- Guru Mann → Desi diet, Hindi content
- Sahil Khan → Indian gym lifestyle

🏃 CARDIO & CONDITIONING:
- Mike Thurston → Cardio integration, lean muscle
- Jeremy Ethier → Evidence-based training
- Knees Over Toes Guy → Injury-proofing, knee longevity`;

const prompt = `You are Kunal's personal AI strength coach delivering his 6 AM morning brief. Kunal follows a PPL A/B split targeting muscle hypertrophy with progressive overload.

CRITICAL RULES:
- Output ALL 7 sections. Do NOT stop early.
- 400-500 words total.
- Speak directly — "you" and "your" always.
- Calories in data = ACTIVE CALORIES BURNED by body from fitness tracker. NOT food consumed. Never say "consumed" or "intake" for calories field.
- Be specific with numbers.
- Section 5 MANDATORY — exactly 2 YouTube recommendations.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📅 YESTERDAY (${reportDate})
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Steps: ${d.steps ?? 'not synced'} ${d.steps ? (d.steps >= 8000 ? '✅ on target' : d.steps >= 5000 ? '⚠️ below 9k goal' : '❌ very low') : ''}
Active Calories BURNED: ${d.calories ?? 'not synced'} kcal
Resting HR: ${d.resting_hr ?? 'N/A'} bpm
Avg Workout HR: ${d.workout_avg_hr ?? 'no workout logged'}
HRV (RMSSD): ${d.hrv_avg ?? 'N/A'} ms → Recovery: ${hrvFlag}
Weight: ${d.weight ?? 'N/A'} kg
Training Load (ATL): ${d.atl ? Math.round(d.atl) : 'N/A'}
Workouts logged: ${d.workout_count ?? 0} — ${d.workout_names ?? 'Rest day'}
Sleep: ${d.sleep_hours ?? 'N/A'} hrs | Score: ${d.sleep_score ?? 'N/A'}/100 | Quality: ${sleepQualityLabel} → ${sleepFlag}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📅 TODAY: ${todayName}, ${today}
🏋️ SESSION: ${todayWorkout.label}
⚡ Type: ${todayWorkout.type} | Intensity: ${todayWorkout.intensity}

TODAY'S WORKOUT PLAN:
${todayWorkout.variations}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

KUNAL'S GOALS:
- 1.5 hr morning strength sessions, PPL A/B split
- 8,000-10,000 steps/day (averaging 5k-6k)
- 10 min cardio after every session
- Build muscle, stay consistent, develop discipline

${creatorsLibrary}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
WRITE ALL 7 SECTIONS:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. 🌅 YESTERDAY RECAP
2 honest data-driven sentences. Use actual numbers. Set tone for today.

2. 💪 WIN OF THE DAY
1-2 specific positives. Precise numbers. Find something real.

3. ⚠️ ONE THING TO FIX
Single most important metric. Connect to muscle building.

4. 🎯 TODAY'S TARGETS — ${todayName}
- Workout: ${todayWorkout.label} — give 1 specific technique tip for today's KEY exercise
- Drop set tip: which drop set exercise to focus on most today and why
- Steps: specific number 8,000-10,000
- Cardio: 10 min post-session — specific type for ${todayWorkout.type} day
- Nutrition: 1 specific tip for ${todayWorkout.type} day

5. 🔥 WATCH THIS TODAY
MANDATORY — exactly 2 creators from approved list. Match to: ${todayWorkout.label}.
Format — two separate lines:
🎥 [5-8 word video topic] → youtube.com/@[Handle] — Search "[3-5 word query]"
🎥 [5-8 word video topic] → youtube.com/@[Handle] — Search "[3-5 word query]"

6. 💡 RECOVERY INTELLIGENCE
1-2 sentences. Use HRV ${d.hrv_avg ?? 'N/A'}ms + sleep ${d.sleep_score ?? 'N/A'}/100. Tell him how hard to push today.

7. 🌙 TONIGHT'S SLEEP TARGET
One sentence. Specific bedtime for 7.5-8 hrs.`;

return [{ json: { prompt, reportDate, today, todayName, todayWorkout, ...d } }];

name: Build Gemini Prompt
notes: Builds advanced 7-section AI prompt with PPL A/B workout splits, HRV/sleep recovery flags, creator library recommendations, and today's session plan.
